016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc;
017
018import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
019
020/**
021 * Interface for an Asynchronous JSON-RPC Server/Service.
022 * <p>
023 * A service-layer abstraction of JSON-RPC using plain old Java objects (POJOs)
024 * Can easily be used in controllers from Java Web frameworks.
025 *
026 */
027public interface JsonRpcService extends AutoCloseable {
028    /**
029     * Handle a JSON-RPC {@link JsonRpcRequest} and return a {@link JsonRpcResponse} POJO
030     * @param req A Request object
031     * @param <RSLT> Generic type for the JSON-RPC <b>result</b> in {@link JsonRpcResponse#getResult()}
032     * @return a future for a Response object with either a <b>result</b> or an error.
033     */
034    <RSLT> CompletableFuture<JsonRpcResponse<RSLT>> call(JsonRpcRequest req);
035}
